goal: Refactor repayment allocation to interest-first, update GL for accrual-basis, and add portfolio-level interest reporting

tasks.name: Refactor repayment allocation to interest-first and track totalInterestPaid
tasks.action: Replace proportional repayment allocation with interest-first: overdue interest → current interest → principal. Update totalInterestPaid on LoanApplication. Create LoanInterestHistory record with eventType REPAYMENT_APPLIED.

tasks.name: Update FinancialEventListener repayment handler for accrual-basis GL entries
tasks.action: Change repayment interest credit from Interest Income (4001) to Interest Receivable (1003). Interest income was already recognized at monthly accrual time; repayment settles the receivable.

tasks.name: Create InterestReportingService with portfolio-level interest summary API
tasks.action: Create MonthlyInterestSummary and MemberInterestSummary DTOs. Create InterestReportingService interface and implementation using LoanInterestHistoryRepository and LoanApplicationRepository. Add REST endpoints: GET /api/v1/loans/interest/summary?month=, GET /api/v1/loans/interest/member/{memberId}, GET /api/v1/loans/interest/arrears.

commitMessage: feat(loan): interest-first repayment allocation and portfolio interest reporting
